instruction:
In $\triangle{ABC},$ let $P$ be on $AC$ such that $BP$ bisects $\angle{ABC}.$ Similarly, let $Q$ be on $AB$ such that $CQ$ bisects $\angle{ACB}.$ Let $BP$ intersect $CQ$ at $R$ . It is known $APRQ$ can be inscribed in a circle. Given that $AP=23$ and $AQ=13,$ find the square of the length of $AR.$

Options:
A. 435
B. 436
C. 433
D. 430
E. 437
F. 431
G. 432
H. 434
I. 439
J. 438
